detectors.description:
Reentrancy in EtherDelta.depositToken(address,uint256) (EtherDelta.sol#483-515):
	External calls:
	- ! ERC20(token).transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount) (EtherDelta.sol#499)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tokens[token][msg.sender] = safeAdd(tokens[token][msg.sender],amount) (EtherDelta.sol#509)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [EtherDelta.depositToken(address,uint256)](EtherDelta.sol#L483-L515):
	External calls:
	- [! ERC20(token).transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),amount)](EtherDelta.sol#L499)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tokens[token][msg.sender] = safeAdd(tokens[token][msg.sender],amount)](EtherDelta.sol#L509)

detectors.description: solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.5.3 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage.
It is used by:
	- ^0.5.3 (EtherDelta.sol#1)
detectors.markdown:
Version constraint ^0.5.3 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage.
It is used by:
	- [^0.5.3](EtherDelta.sol#L1)
